nodes.title: Math
widgets_values:
Output will be 1.5X of the width and height value. So

1280 x 1.5 = 1920
720 x 1.5 = 1080

nodes.title: Turn it to true for T2V
Mel-Band RoFormer Model Loader Download link

widgets_values:
A medium close-up shot of a young professional wearing a crisp white button-up shirt and a high-quality headset with microphone, seated in a modern, well-lit office environment. Natural light streams through large windows behind him, illuminating the space with soft, warm illumination that creates a professional yet inviting atmosphere. The background features a neatly organized wooden shelving unit adorned with various potted plants in white and metallic containers, adding a touch of greenery to the contemporary workspace. To the right, a whiteboard with subtle sketches is partially visible, suggesting an active work environment. Their expression engaged and professional as they maintain steady eye contact with the camera while speaking with subtle, natural head movements and hand gestures. The camera remains perfectly stable throughout the sequence, capturing the subject with shallow depth of field that keeps them in sharp focus while softly blurring the background elements. Film grain and natural color grading enhance the authentic quality of the footage, creating a polished, professional appearance that matches the modern office setting. The scene flows smoothly from the initial setup to the natural conclusion of the speaking segment, maintaining a continuous, unbroken shot that perfectly fits within the 4-second duration constraint.

AUDIO :
Accurate lip sync related to the input audio
